title: Northwind achieves SOC 2 Type II certification for its data platform
subtitle: Third-party audit confirms continuous compliance controls across all production systems
metaDescription: Northwind announces SOC 2 Type II certification for its enterprise data platform.
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. today announced that its data platform has received SOC 2 Type II certification following a six-month audit by Prescott Assurance Partners.

title: Northwind and Meridian Capital announce strategic data partnership
subtitle: Integration will bring Northwind's analytics layer to Meridian's 4,200 enterprise clients
metaDescription: Northwind and Meridian Capital announce a data partnership covering 4,200 enterprise clients.
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. and Meridian Capital Group announced today a multi-year data partnership that will integrate Northwind's analytics platform directly into Meridian's enterprise client portal.

title: Northwind Platform 4.2 ships with native HIPAA compliance mode
subtitle: Healthcare customers can now enable field-level encryption and audit logging in one step
metaDescription: Northwind Platform 4.2 release adds HIPAA compliance mode for healthcare customers.
bodyHtml: Northwind today released Platform 4.2, adding a HIPAA compliance mode that allows healthcare-sector customers to enable field-level encryption and full audit logging through a single configuration flag.

title: Northwind appoints Clara Henning as Chief Revenue Officer
subtitle: Henning joins from Datastream Analytics, where she built the go-to-market team from twelve to 140
metaDescription: Northwind Inc. appoints Clara Henning as Chief Revenue Officer.
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. announced today that Clara Henning has joined the company as Chief Revenue Officer. Henning was previously Vice President of Sales at Datastream Analytics, where she scaled the go-to-market team from twelve to 140 people over four years.

title: Northwind expands EU data residency to cover Frankfurt and Warsaw regions
subtitle: Customers can now pin data storage to a single EU country to meet local regulatory requirements
metaDescription: Northwind adds Frankfurt and Warsaw data residency options for EU enterprise customers.
bodyHtml: Northwind today expanded its EU data residency program to include Frankfurt and Warsaw, giving enterprise customers the ability to pin all stored data to a single EU jurisdiction.

title: Northwind Q1 2026: platform processes 2.4 trillion events across 890 customers
subtitle: Customer count grew 34 percent year-over-year; enterprise tier now represents 61 percent of ARR
metaDescription: Northwind Q1 2026 metrics: 2.4 trillion events, 890 customers, 34 percent growth.
bodyHtml: Northwind Inc. today published first-quarter 2026 platform metrics. The company processed 2.4 trillion events across 890 customers, with customer count growing 34 percent year-over-year.
